variants.title: Mann Filter C 14 179 x Air Filter | Replaces the Donaldson P500123
variants.description: High-quality MANN-FILTER air filters for clean air intake and optimum protection for your engine, mass air flow sensor & other sensitive components / They meet requirements of modern engine technology. Highest dirt holding capacity and dirt separation efficiency, low flow resistance and high pleat stability ensure functional reliability during the entire service interval.
specifications: Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency
calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 99%

variants.title: Donaldson P500123 Air Primary, Round
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P500123 Air Primary, Round provides clean, efficient airflow for engines by trapping airborne contaminants. Its round design maximizes filtration surface area while maintaining high airflow rates. Perfect for heavy-duty applications, this air primary filter enhances engine longevity and supports consistent performance.
specifications: Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency
calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 99%

variants.title: Fleetguard AF25070K Air Filter | Replaces the Donaldson P500123
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF25070K axial seal primary air filter ensures a proper seal and prevent leaks to prevent airborne contaminants from reaching the combustion chamber.
specifications: Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency
calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 99%
